introSection: Dragonflier is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA. It was designed by Vekoma and opened in May 2019.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was officially announced as a suspended family roller coaster on August 3, 2018 alongside the rest of Wildwood Grove.

In March 2019, Dollywood announced that Wildwood Grove would open on May 10, 2019.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Dragonflier has a light green track and emerald green supports.

sections.title: Theme
sections.content: Dragonflier opened as part of a new themed area at Dollywood named Wildwood Grove in 2019. The area contains 7 other attractions and was the largest expansion in Dollywood's history. It is themed to exploring nature and adventuring.

fullText:
Dragonflier is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA. It was designed by Vekoma and opened in May 2019.

The ride was officially announced as a suspended family roller coaster on August 3, 2018 alongside the rest of Wildwood Grove.

In March 2019, Dollywood announced that Wildwood Grove would open on May 10, 2019.



Dragonflier has a light green track and emerald green supports.



Dragonflier opened as part of a new themed area at Dollywood named Wildwood Grove in 2019. The area contains 7 other attractions and was the largest expansion in Dollywood's history. It is themed to exploring nature and adventuring.
